permanent_unlocks.name: Endurance Training
permanent_unlocks.flavor: Your body remembers what your mind forgets.

permanent_unlocks.name: Hardened Constitution
permanent_unlocks.description: Start every run with +8 max HP
permanent_unlocks.flavor: Scar tissue is stronger than skin.

permanent_unlocks.name: Silver Sense
permanent_unlocks.description: Start every run with 15 bonus silver
permanent_unlocks.flavor: You always know where to look.

permanent_unlocks.name: Quick Recovery
permanent_unlocks.flavor: Get up faster. Stay up longer.

permanent_unlocks.name: Resonance Memory
permanent_unlocks.description: Carry one random common modifier into each new run
permanent_unlocks.flavor: The Shrine lets you hold onto something.

permanent_unlocks.name: Inner Knowledge
permanent_unlocks.description: Inner Ring contract target reduced by 1 (min 2)

permanent_unlocks.name: Warden Lore
permanent_unlocks.description: Warden enters combat with phase thresholds visible
permanent_unlocks.flavor: You studied the reports. Now you know when it changes.

permanent_unlocks.name: Artifact Echo
permanent_unlocks.description: On artifact retrieval, carry one random rare modifier into next run
permanent_unlocks.flavor: The artifact left an echo in you.

permanent_unlocks.name: Itinerant Legacy
permanent_unlocks.description: Unlock the Legacy title shown on run summary
